summary: Issues in UAT Feeding FRA Sec Type securities through XML processor Service
details:
Original Question posed by Guillaume.

Hi Quick question, if I wanted to create a security dropping a file in CR UAT, where would I be able to drop this:
 
    <security id="generic_swap__36" op="create"><ticker>generic_swap__36</ticker>  <secTypeCd>GSWAP</secTypeCd><comments>Deriv-2.0</comments><secName>Generic Swap Import</secName><udfChar_28>ASSET</udfChar_28> <!--Swap Class--><udfChar_29>NEW</udfChar_29>   <!--Swap Type--><issuerId>ANZBG</issuerId><swapType>NEW</swapType><locCrrncyCd>USD</locCrrncyCd><issueDate>2023-06-21</issueDate> <!-- Start Date--><matureDate>2028-05-20</matureDate><settleDate>2023-06-22</settleDate> <!-- Payment Date--><mktPrice>0.0</mktPrice><listExchCd>OTC</listExchCd><settleCrrncyCd>USD</settleCrrncyCd><locCrrncyCd>USD</locCrrncyCd>      </security>

details_html:
Original Question posed by Guillaume.



Hi Quick question, if I wanted to create a security dropping a file in CR UAT, where would I be able to drop this:

 

    <security id="generic_swap__36" op="create">
<ticker>generic_swap__36</ticker>  
<secTypeCd>GSWAP</secTypeCd>
<comments>Deriv-2.0</comments>
<secName>Generic Swap Import</secName>
<udfChar_28>ASSET</udfChar_28> <!--Swap Class-->
<udfChar_29>NEW</udfChar_29>   <!--Swap Type-->
<issuerId>ANZBG</issuerId>
<swapType>NEW</swapType>
<locCrrncyCd>USD</locCrrncyCd>
<issueDate>2023-06-21</issueDate> <!-- Start Date-->
<matureDate>2028-05-20</matureDate>
<settleDate>2023-06-22</settleDate> <!-- Payment Date-->
<mktPrice>0.0</mktPrice>
<listExchCd>OTC</listExchCd>
<settleCrrncyCd>USD</settleCrrncyCd>
<locCrrncyCd>USD</locCrrncyCd>      
</security>
closure_note: Addressed core asks within UAT around feeding FRA security via XML Process Server into Charles River.
